calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-25-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom: Sara Taylor, Esq. for Robert E. Lee Jr. (Petitioner/Administrator). Michael Perkins (Interested Party).

Ms. Taylor stated that her client was unable to appear today because he could not take the time off of work. The Court stated that it was going to grant the petition with the inclusion of language in the order as to how Ms. Taylor is going to be paid. The order will reflect language that roughly states that Ms. Taylor has reached an agreement with her client, that her client will pay Ms. Taylor outside of the estate, and that she is entitled to fees and the advanced costs. The Court noted that it would then let Ms. Taylor pursue her side remedies.

At the conclusion of comments, the First and Final Report of Personal Representative and Petition for Final Distribution on Waiver of Account and for Payment of Compensation for Ordinary Services to Attorney for Personal Representative is taken under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Cristobal. Matter not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-20-2022 Continued To Jan-24-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sara Taylor, via Zoom, for Robert E. Lee Jr., Personal Representative.

The court advises counsel that it is looking for formal memorandum of points and authorities to support the request for distribution considering the issue of the existing written and recorded disclaimer which is irrevocable according to probate code. Counsel reports that she intends to file the memorandum as requested.

The matter is continued to Jan-24-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Counsel is instructed to file the memorandum of points and authorities by Jan-13-2023 and deliver a courtesy copy of the same to Dept. 204 by Jan-17-2023.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Of The Estate
Off Calendar Nov-01-2021 Continued To Dec-13-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sara Taylor, via ZOOM, for Robert Lee Jr., Personal Representative.
Counsel reports that there is a pending claim against the estate for $6,000 which she hopes to have resolved within sixty days. The court points to the unauthorized distribution. Counsel advises that a transfer will be made back to the estate which initially had been made by mistake.

After additional discussion, the Status on Close of Estate is continued to Dec-13-2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
